rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOSEPH & PAULINE AQUILINA 2004 LIVING TRUST U/D/T 5/8/04
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And For Order Determining Interest In Property, Supporting Declaration Of Robert J. Sheppard, And Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Dismiss Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment and for Order Determining Interest in Property is continued by the Court to 11/6/13 for a procedural issue. Petitioners' opposition to the Motion was filed October 28, 2013, two days prior to the hearing. The Motion is continued to give Respondents an opportunity to reply - specifically with respect to California Probate Code section 16061.8 and its applicability to the Trustees. Motion continued to November 6, 2013 at 2:30 p.m. in Department 204 of the San Francisco Superior Court, located at 400 McAllister Street, San Francisco, CA. Any party who cannot appear for the November 6, 2013 hearing must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on October 29, 2013. Entered by SKH for the reviewing Judge.
